name: a73-clone
description: Réplica editável do A73 - Vue 3 + Ionic

scripts.legacy:previews: npx --yes concurrently -k -n site,jt0,clone,orig "npx --yes sirv-cli atualizado/site_baixado --single --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3010" "npx --yes sirv-cli jt0c6h_baixado --single --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3011" "npx --yes sirv-cli frontend-clone --single --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3012" "npx --yes sirv-cli public/original --single --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3013"
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
